footer.description: Stellar Consulting is a healthcare consulting firm dedicated to delivering impactful projects across the Middle East and Africa region for over 15 years. Our mission is to provide innovative, high-quality, and impactful products to our clients while utilizing a unique partnership approach.

modal.title: Schedule a Meeting with Us

hero.title: We think rigorously.
hero.intro:
Stellar is a 360 healthcare consultancy firm providing integrated solutions across healthcare advertising, scientific communication, market access, and healthcare partnerships.

For 15 years, we have been committed to delivering premium quality and innovative solutions that exceed our customers' expectations, supporting healthcare organizations in navigating complex markets and creating meaningful impact across the healthcare ecosystem.

mission.label: Mission
mission.heading: Empowering healthcare with strategy and scale.
mission.body: We empower healthcare companies with innovative event management solutions and strategic consulting services that enhance communication, drive innovation, and elevate industry standards.

vision.label: Vision
vision.heading: Transforming healthcare delivery across the region.
vision.body: To transform healthcare delivery across the Middle East and Africa by providing innovative, high-quality solutions through strategic partnerships.

items.title: Exclusive focus on pharmaceutical
items.body: Every engagement is built specifically for pharma and biotech — never adapted from generic playbooks.

items.title: Proven consulting expertise
items.body: A senior team with decades of combined experience across market access, medical affairs, and brand strategy.

items.title: Comprehensive event management
items.body: From 50-person symposia to 2,000-attendee international congresses — full creative, logistics, and production.

items.title: Regulatory expertise
items.body: Deep familiarity with regional compliance frameworks across MEA — KSA, UAE, Egypt, and beyond.

items.title: Cutting-edge digital solutions
items.body: Interactive event experiences, hybrid platforms, and digital tools that engage audiences beyond the room.

items.title: Tailored creativity
items.body: We don't recycle decks or templates. Every campaign is designed for the specific brand, audience, and moment.

items.title: Expert medical training consulting
items.body: Curriculum design, faculty engagement, and accredited program development for HCPs across the region.

items.title: End-to-end support
items.body: One partner, one accountable team — from initial strategy through post-event analytics.

items.title: Respect
items.body: For our clients, our partners, and the patients ultimately served by our work.

items.title: Passion
items.body: We're in healthcare because the work matters. That energy shows up everywhere.

items.title: Attitude
items.body: We solve, we don't complain. Pragmatic, positive, professional.

items.title: Results-driven
items.body: Beautiful execution that also moves the metrics that matter.

items.title: Ownership
items.body: Your problem becomes ours the moment you engage us. Full stop.

items.title: Quality & excellence
items.body: Premium is a baseline, not a feature. We don't ship anything we wouldn't sign.

members.name: Prof. Samar Mansour
members.bio: A pharmaceutical industry veteran with deep regional expertise, Prof. Samar founded Stellar to bring scientific rigor and creative ambition under one roof.

members.name: Dr. Yehia Akl
members.bio: Leads strategic partnerships across MEA, building the relationships that turn one-off engagements into long-term collaborations.

members.name: Dr. Tariq Nasr
members.bio: Translates clinical complexity into compelling creative — the bridge between scientific accuracy and audience engagement.

regional.heading: Operating in 8 countries across the Middle East.
regional.body: From flagship offices in Dubai, Riyadh, and Cairo, we deliver on the ground in every major MEA market — with the local relationships and regulatory know-how that complex healthcare work demands.

cta.heading: Ready to start the conversation?
cta.body: Whether it's a single launch event or a multi-year strategic engagement, the first step is the same.

hero.title: Let's start the
hero.intro: Every great engagement begins with a conversation. Tell us what you're working on — we'll respond within one business day, often the same day.

form.label: Send us a message
form.success: Thank you. We'll be in touch within one business day.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.

hero.title: Five disciplines.
hero.intro: From strategic consulting to flawless event execution, we cover every touchpoint a healthcare brand needs across the Middle East and Africa.

intro.label: How we work
intro.heading: Strategy and execution under one roof.
intro.body: Most agencies pick a lane — they think, or they make. We do both. The same team that develops your market access strategy can also produce the launch event that brings it to life. Fewer handoffs, tighter alignment, work that compounds.

services.title: Healthcare Advertising & Brand Engagement
services.summary: Creative campaigns and brand activation tailored for regulated healthcare audiences.

services.title: Medical Affairs & Communication Solutions
services.summary: Bridge clinical evidence with practical communication for HCPs, patients, and payers.

services.title: Market Access & Payer Strategy
services.summary: Navigate complex regional markets with evidence-based access strategies.

services.title: Health System Partnerships
services.summary: Build sustainable collaborations with regional health systems and authorities.

services.title: Digital & Innovative Solutions
services.summary: Interactive platforms, hybrid experiences, and digital tools that engage beyond the room.

steps.title: Listen
steps.body: We start by understanding the brand, the audience, the regulatory landscape, and what success looks like for you.

steps.title: Architect
steps.body: We design the strategy, channels, creative, and execution plan — always tied to measurable outcomes.

steps.title: Execute
steps.body: Our integrated team delivers — strategy, creative, production, logistics — with no handoffs between disciplines.

steps.title: Measure
steps.body: We close the loop with analytics, learnings, and recommendations that compound across future engagements.

cta.heading: Not sure which service fits?
cta.body: Tell us about the challenge. We'll help shape the right engagement.

healthcare-advertising.overview: We build healthcare brand campaigns that move beyond awareness — campaigns that change perception, drive HCP engagement, and translate into measurable behavioral shifts. Every brief starts with deep audience understanding: which therapy areas, which prescriber profiles, which patient journeys we're trying to influence.

approach.title: Audience-first thinking
approach.body: We don't start with creative. We start with the specific HCP segment, patient profile, or payer mindset we need to reach — then build outward from there.

approach.title: Compliance built-in
approach.body: Every campaign goes through medical, legal, and regulatory review at the right stages — so we don't waste creative cycles on ideas that won't make it past compliance.

approach.title: Channel agnostic
approach.body: Print, digital, congress, OOH, hybrid events — we pick channels by audience behavior, not by what's trendy this quarter.

medical-affairs.overview: Medical affairs sits at the intersection of clinical evidence and commercial reality. We help pharma teams translate the science into materials and engagements that earn trust from KOLs, satisfy regulatory expectations, and equip field teams with what they actually need.

approach.title: Scientific rigor
approach.body: Every piece of content is built from primary literature and reviewed by qualified medical writers and our scientific advisory board.

approach.title: Strategic KOL engagement
approach.body: We don't just book speakers — we map influence networks, identify rising voices, and build long-term relationships across therapy areas.

approach.title: Field-ready output
approach.body: Materials are designed for the way reps actually work: short, visual, defensible, with the source data one click away.

market-access.overview: Market access in MEA isn't a checklist — it's eight regulatory environments, eight payer mindsets, and a constantly shifting landscape. We help global pharma teams build region-specific value stories, navigate reimbursement pathways, and engage payers as partners rather than gatekeepers.

approach.title: Local intelligence
approach.body: Our consultants live in the markets they cover. KSA insights come from KSA. UAE strategy comes from people who've sat across the table from MOH.

approach.title: Evidence that travels
approach.body: We build value dossiers that work for global HQ but adapt for each local market — same core narrative, locally relevant data.

approach.title: Payer engagement, not pitching
approach.body: We approach payers as long-term partners. That changes the conversation from 'sell the price' to 'solve the problem together'.

health-system-partnerships.overview: Sustainable change in healthcare doesn't happen one product at a time — it happens through partnerships with the systems that deliver care. We help pharma, medtech, and government bodies design collaborations that improve outcomes while building lasting institutional relationships.

approach.title: Outcomes over outputs
approach.body: We design partnerships around measurable patient outcomes — not just activity metrics like training hours or units distributed.

approach.title: Multi-stakeholder alignment
approach.body: Hospitals, MOHs, professional societies, NGOs — sustainable programs need all of them aligned. We build the connective tissue.

approach.title: Built to scale
approach.body: Pilots designed from day one to scale regionally — common protocols, shared data infrastructure, repeatable training models.

technology-services.overview: Healthcare engagement is going hybrid permanently. We build the digital infrastructure — platforms, apps, interactive content, analytics — that lets pharma brands engage HCPs and patients across physical and digital touchpoints with consistency and measurement.

approach.title: Platform-agnostic design
approach.body: We build for where your audience already is — WhatsApp, web, native apps, congress platforms — rather than forcing them onto our preferred stack.

approach.title: Analytics from day one
approach.body: Every interaction logged, every engagement measured. We treat dashboards as a deliverable, not an afterthought.

approach.title: Compliant by design
approach.body: GDPR, KSA PDPL, HIPAA — privacy and consent flows baked into the architecture, not retrofitted later.

categoryDescriptions.success: The pharma and biotech companies whose brands, launches, and ongoing engagements anchor our work — many for over a decade.
categoryDescriptions.accreditation: The professional bodies and standards organizations whose accreditation gives our programs scientific weight.
categoryDescriptions.endorsing: The hospitals, foundations, and institutions whose endorsement signals confidence in how we deliver care-related work.

cta.heading: Could your team be next?
cta.body: Most partnerships start with one project. The good ones never end.

intro.body: Booth designs, congress productions, training programs, digital activations — a curated look at what we've built across MEA. Filter by category to focus on the type of work most relevant to you.

cta.heading: Want to be in next year's gallery?
cta.body: The work that ends up here started with a conversation. Yours could be next.
